name: HNS_INCIDENT_WITNESSES_
description: HNS INCIDENT WITNESSES. This table stores witness information related to an incident event.

columns.Name: WITNESS_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Witness Identifier.Primary key for HNS_INCIDENT_WITNESSES table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: EMPLOYEE_ID column  : Employee ID if witness is an employee.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_ID column  : Assignment ID if witness is an employee.

columns.Name: WITNESS_PER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: EMP/NON EMP lookup. To check whether the witness is an employee or not.

columns.Name: WITNESS_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique Witness type id. Foreign key for WITNESS_TYPE_ID

columns.Name: WITNESS_NAME
columns.Comments: Witness Name (for both Employee and Non Employee)

columns.Name: WITNESS_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Witness email id when employee is an non employee.

columns.Name: WITNESS_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM
columns.Comments: WITNESS_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM : Witness phoney country code number.

columns.Name: WITNESS_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: WITNESS_AREA_CODE column : Witness phone area code number.

columns.Name: WITNESS_PHONE
columns.Comments: Witness phone number. This is for non employee only.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the incident witness is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
